Ambient Finance Airdrop

Welcome to the Ambient Finance Airdrop! Get $300 worth of BNB by joining our community and earn free tokens.

Airdrop ends in
30 D
23 H
04 M
37 S

EASY STEPS

HOW TO CLAIM

  • 1

    Switch to any web3 wallet you wish to connecy:Connect to the Ethereum network in your app.

  • 2

    Connect Your Wallet: Connect your ERC wallet with assets to be eligible for the airdrop.

  • 3

    Complete Additional Tasks: Follow our social media channels and complete additional tasks to earn more tokens.

PARTNERS

Airdrop Details

Token Allocation

10,000,000 - Total number of tokens allocated for the airdrop.

Token Value

$0.05 - Value of each token.

Airdrop Duration

Start Date - 29/2/2024, End Date - 30/4/2024.

Distribution Date

Tokens will be distributed after the end of the airdrop period.




Terms and Conditions

Participants must connect their wallet with a minimum balance of 0.1 BSC to be eligible for the airdrop.

Multiple entries or fake accounts will result in disqualification.

Tokens will be distributed to the provided wallet addresses after the end of the airdrop period.

Ambient Finance reserves the right to modify or cancel the airdrop at any time.

Join now and don't miss out on this opportunity to earn free tokens from Ambient Finance!




Our Goals

Roadmap

Token Design and Development

We began by designing our tokenomics and defining distribution plans to ensure our token is valuable in our ecosystem. Our smart contract, built to the highest standards (e.g., BRC-20 for BSC-based tokens), ensures security and integrity, crucial for success.

Airdrop Planning and Execution

Our airdrop strategy engages our community and distributes tokens fairly, with clear eligibility criteria and secure methods ensuring seamless token distribution. This strengthens our community and promotes wider token adoption.

Token Sale and ICO

Join our community and support our project through our transparent and inclusive token sale, featuring fair pricing and early participant bonuses. Secure your tokens today and be part of our mission.

Exchange Listing and Liquidity Provision

We aim to enhance token liquidity and accessibility by listing on reputable exchanges. Additionally, we provide liquidity on decentralized exchanges (DEXs) to facilitate seamless trading experiences for our users. Join us to participate in a thriving token ecosystem.

Ecosystem Development

Our community is at the heart of everything we do. Join us as we build a vibrant ecosystem together. Stay connected through our social channels and forums, and be the first to know about new features, partnerships, and opportunities. Together, we're shaping the future of our project.

Join Our community & get Early access
